name: BB:CategoryDefinition: Object Deleted Events
notes: Edit this Building Block to include any object deletion event categories.
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: Object Deleted Events on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event category for the event is one of the following System.File Deleted, Audit.Delete Activity Attempted, Audit.Delete Activity Succeeded, Audit.Object Removal Attempt, Audit.Object Removal Success
TD_list: APPLY BB:CategoryDefinition: Object Deleted Events on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event category for the event is one of the following System.File Deleted, Audit.Delete Activity Attempted, Audit.Delete Activity Succeeded, Audit.Object Removal Attempt, Audit.Object Removal Success
